title: ornithopus isthmocarpus var. leiocarpus
intro: Ornithopus isthmocarpus var. leiocarpus is a variety of Ornithopus isthmocarpus, a plant species commonly known as white bird's-foot trefoil. It is a type of legume used for medicinal purposes, known for its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues. Ornithopus isthmocarpus var. leiocarpus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
